title: Business Process Management Research Artifact Taxonomy
description: Schema derived from the BI_Structure_Full taxonomy for classifying research papers and artifacts.

doi_or_url.description: DOI or URL to the paper

track.description: Research track on Business Process Management Conference

keywords.description: Author-defined or indexed keywords, highlighted above introduction

goal_paper.description: The main goal or contribution of the paper, as stated by the authors

question.description: The primary question the research seeks to answer

hidden_in_text.description: Whether the research question is explicitly stated in the text or inferred by readers

highlighted_in_text.description: Whether the research question is highlighted in the text (e.g., bolded, italicized, or in a separate section)

motivation_paper.description: The motivation behind the research, as stated by the authors

outcome_paper.description: The main findings or outcomes of the research, as stated by the authors

formal_science.description: Whether the research is primarily focused on formal scientific inquiry, such as developing theories

information_systems_engineering.description: Whether the research is primarily focused on information systems engineering, such as designing and implementing systems

scientific_study.description: Whether the research is primarily focused on scientific study, such as empirical investigations

inductive_study.description: Whether the research is primarily focused on inductive study, such as case studies

meta_analysis.description: Whether the research is primarily focused on meta-analysis, such as systematic reviews

industrial_application.description: Whether the research is primarily focused on industrial application, such as real-world implementations

formal_theory.description: Whether the research contributes a formal theory

social_science_theory.description: Whether the research contributes a social science theory

both.description: Whether the research contributes both formal and social science theories

theory.description: Whether the research emphasizes theoretical contributions

artifact.description: Whether the research emphasizes artifact contributions

both.description: Whether the research emphasizes both theoretical and artifact contributions

formal_concepts.description: Whether the research contributes formal concepts

independent_variables.description: Independent variables studied in the research

dependent_variables.description: Dependent variables studied in the research

algorithm.description: Whether the artifact is an algorithm

tool_implementation.description: Whether the artifact is a tool implementation

prototype.description: Whether the artifact is a prototype

method.description: Whether the artifact is a method

technique.description: Whether the artifact is a technique

language.description: Whether the artifact is a language

design_concept.description: Whether the artifact is a design concept

framework.description: Whether the artifact is a framework

taxonomy.description: Whether the artifact is a taxonomy

model.description: Whether the artifact is a model

report.description: Whether the artifact is a report

formal_proof.description: Whether the research method includes a formal proof

survey.description: Whether the research method includes a survey

lab_experiment.description: Whether the research method includes a lab experiment

field_experiment.description: Whether the research method includes a field experiment

case_study.description: Whether the research method includes a case study

interviews.description: Whether the research method includes an interview

design_science_engineering.description: Whether the research method includes design science engineering

simulation.description: Whether the research method includes a simulation

systematic_review.description: Whether the research method includes a systematic review

action_research.description: Whether the research method includes action research

illustrative_example.description: Whether the research method includes an illustrative example

literature_analysis.description: Whether the research method includes a literature analysis

other.description: Other research methods not listed above

none.description: Whether the research method does not fit into any of the categories above

verification.description: Whether the evaluation method includes verification

field_experiment.description: Whether the evaluation method includes a field experiment

benchmark.description: Whether the evaluation method includes benchmarking against existing methods

grounded_theory.description: Whether the evaluation method includes grounded theory

argumentation.description: Whether the evaluation method includes logical argumentation

controlled_experiment.description: Whether the evaluation method includes a controlled experiment

data_science.description: Whether the evaluation method includes data science techniques, such as data analysis or machine learning

focus_group.description: Whether the evaluation method includes a focus group

questionnaire.description: Whether the evaluation method includes a questionnaire

interview.description: Whether the evaluation method includes interviews

motivating_example.description: Whether the evaluation method includes a motivating example

technical_experiment.description: Whether the evaluation method includes a technical experiment, such as testing the artifact in a lab setting

case_study.description: Whether the evaluation method includes a case study

none.description: Whether the evaluation method does not fit into any of the categories above

real_world_data.description: Whether the data in the paper is real-world data

synthetic_data.description: Whether the data in the paper is synthetic data

both.description: Whether the data in the paper includes both real-world and synthetic data

mathematical_formulae.description: Whether the data in the paper includes mathematical formulae

undefined.description: Whether the paper does not specify the type of data used

total_participants.description: Total number of participants involved in the study, if applicable

students.description: Number of student participants, if applicable

practitioners.description: Number of practitioner participants, if applicable

material_accessibility.description: Whether the materials used in the study are accessible to the public

data_accessibility.description: Whether the data used in the study is accessible to the public

internal_validity.description: Whether the paper discusses threats to internal validity

external_validity.description: Whether the paper discusses threats to external validity

construct_validity.description: Whether the paper discusses threats to construct validity

ecological_validity.description: Whether the paper discusses threats to ecological validity

confirmability.description: Whether the paper discusses threats to confirmability

reliability.description: Whether the paper discusses threats to reliability

existence.description: Whether the paper includes an implementation of the artifact

availability.description: Whether the implementation of the artifact is available to the public
